message:
fix: guard shared.ts and useCachedData.ts agent calls with isDemoModeForced

fetchClusterListFromAgent() intentionally bypassed demo mode checks
("agent may have real data") which is correct for localhost but
generates 100+ CORS errors on Netlify. Guard with isDemoModeForced.

useCachedData.ts local isDemoMode() returned false when demo clusters
were in cache (treating them as "real data"), causing agent fetch
attempts. Add isDemoModeForced check first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
